benefits.description: more improvement in wrinkles, skin elasticity, general younger appearance compared to long-term Tretinoin and Tazarotene use

protocol_notes: Started at 3mg daily at week 4, escalated to 10mg daily without cycling. Age 31, female. Claims no adverse effects reported at 5mg daily for years; dosages over 10mg daily rarely used and may require zinc supplementation (12.5mg daily). States upper safe dosage is 10mg; higher doses risk overstimulation of receptors reducing benefit.
